steps.name: clarify_runtime_identity
steps.command: Resolve whether the target is a public NeMo checkpoint or a NIM-only docker deployment.

steps.name: prepare_container_recipe
steps.command: Build src/sure_eval/models/parakeet_1_1b_rnnt_multilingual_asr/Dockerfile after the runtime identity and weight source are clarified.

steps.name: fetch_weights_or_container_assets
steps.command: Acquire the exact multilingual checkpoint or authorized NIM assets once the model source is confirmed.

steps.name: validate_runtime
steps.command: Run import/load/infer/contract checks against the clarified runtime using a multilingual fixture that exists locally.

constraints: The exact requested multilingual checkpoint is not yet evidenced as a public NeMo or Hugging Face asset.
Root-backed storage and escalated commands would be needed for any meaningful build attempt.
